goal: Release v7.0.0 as Agent Session Observability with package, docs, manifest, README, audits, tests, smoke, and release notes aligned.
risk: Release could overclaim session reconstructability as semantic correctness, or ship with release surface and verification evidence out of sync.
loss_boundary: Do not tag v7.0.0 unless session observability, release-state, governance, command surface, focused tests, full tests, and smoke validation are green; do not claim truth beyond reconstructable process evidence.
acceptance_gates: v7.0 release definition, checklist, notes, README, package, project bootstrap, active release manifest, organization contract, roadmap, and release plan are aligned

session-observability-audit, work-readiness-audit, quality-ledger-audit, release-state-audit, organization-verify, command-routing-audit, cli-help-benchmark, decision-verify, governance audits, focused tests, npm test, and smoke pass
evidence_plan: Use docs/v7.0-release-definition.md, docs/v7.0-release-checklist.md, docs/v7.0.0-release-notes.md, session observability audit artifact, focused tests, npm test, and smoke validation as release evidence.
stop_conditions: Stop at release-ready sign-off after all verification gates pass, or defer if any audit/test fails.
